phases.result:
Planning pipeline complete. Working tree is clean (only the gitignored `temp/` remains).

## `/plan` result

**Story #1 — JSON REST API for user accounts and personal notes (Node ESM, on-disk store)** — created and `agent::ready`.
🔗 https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-23-story-scope-mandrel-28c3d152/issues/1

### How the pipeline ran
- **Interrogate** — `complexityRoute: full` (178-word seed, above the lite threshold); no duplicate Stories; fresh empty ESM repo (Node v24, `type: module`, scripts: typecheck/lint/`node --test`); no risk heuristics matched.
- **Author** — one cohesive Story (default-single policy). It's a single coupled capability — auth + sessions + notes + persistence — so splitting would break the contract; no sibling tickets.
- **Critics** — consolidation and pre-mortem both `dispatch: false`; text-hygiene clean. Proceeded to persist.
- **Persist** — dry-run passed every gate, then real persist. One wave, no dependencies.

### Design captured in the Story
- **Standard library only**: `node:http` for the server/router, `node:sqlite` (`DatabaseSync`) for the embedded on-disk file — no external web framework.
- **Persistence**: SQLite file (`DB_PATH`, default `data/app.db`), `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` for `users`/`sessions`/`notes` → survives restart.
- **Auth**: `scrypt` + per-user salt (no plaintext passwords), opaque random bearer tokens persisted in `sessions`, per-user note scoping for multi-user isolation.
- **Endpoints**: `/signup`, `/login`, `/me`, `POST /notes`, `GET /notes`, with sensible 400/401/404/405/409 handling.
- **`start` script**: `node src/server.js` listening on `PORT || 3000`.
- **Verify**: `npm test` (unit) + `npm run typecheck` (validate); 9 observable acceptance criteria.

Per the benchmark constraints, I ran **only** the planning pipeline — no delivery. To implement:

```
/deliver 1
```

**Delivered.** `/deliver 1 --yes` ran the existing plan through the single Story delivery engine — no re-planning.

## Result: `landed`

Story #1 delivered via `story-1` → **PR #2** → merged to `main`; Story flipped to `agent::done`. Single-Story run, so the per-run epilogue is skipped (follow-ups captured on merge confirm).

**Implemented** — dependency-free Node ESM JSON API (`node:http` + `node:sqlite`, on-disk SQLite):
- `src/db.js` — SQLite file store (`DB_PATH`, default `data/app.db`), idempotent DDL for `users`/`sessions`/`notes`, scrypt password hashing with per-user salt + constant-time verify, opaque `randomBytes` session tokens, per-user-scoped queries.
- `src/app.js` — request handler with JSON parse (non-JSON reject + 100 KiB cap), bearer auth, and routes: `POST /signup` (201/409/400), `POST /login` (`{session}`/401), `GET /me` (401-gated), `POST /notes` (201/401/400), `GET /notes` (own notes only), 404/405 fallbacks, crash-guarding `.catch`.
- `src/server.js` — `start` entry listening on `PORT` (default 3000); `package.json` gained `"start": "node src/server.js"`; `.gitignore` ignores `data/`.
- `test/api.test.js` — 10 HTTP integration tests over a real server + temp DB covering AC-1..AC-9 (incl. restart persistence and no plaintext passwords on disk).

**Verified** — `npm test` 10/10 passing, `npm run typecheck` passing, AC-1 curl smoke test, acceptance self-eval 9/9 met, close gates (validation, base-sync, code review) all clean.

**One non-blocking note:** the post-land `baseFastForward` step was skipped because the `main` checkout's working tree is dirty from the pre-existing untracked `temp/` artifacts. The merge itself stands — this is cosmetic and doesn't affect the land.
